title: Intercontinental Exchange: Stable Dividends In Shaky Banking Climate
text: Intercontinental Exchange offers a favorable long-term risk/reward with consistent growth, a strong dividend yield, and a diversified portfolio. The company's acquisition of Black Knight positions it as a major player in the mortgage service industry, with high free cash flow growth expectations.

title: Undervalued Dividend Stocks Watchlist - May 8th Update
text: We have not removed or added any companies to the list since the last update mid-April. We have seen Telecom REITs and oil names become more attractively priced in the last 2-4 weeks.

title: 5 Securities and Exchanges to Gain From Increased Volatility
text: A compelling and diversified product portfolio helps drive revenues of Zacks Securities and Exchanges industry players.

title: Intercontinental (ICE) to Report Q1 Earnings: What's in Store?
text: Intercontinental's (ICE) first-quarter results are likely to reflect higher transaction revenues, growth in agricultural commodities and lower expenses, offset by lower mortgage origination volumes.
